editors_pick.title: A New Study Reveals the States With the Most Megachurches
editors_pick.summary: Megachurches aren’t exactly a niche American phenomenon anymore. According to the Hartford Institute for Religion Research, the U.S. had more than 1,800 megachurches by 2020, up from just 350 in 1990 and 650 in 2000. And a new map using Hartford’s megachurch database breaks down exactly where tho...
editors_pick.author: Emily Brown

articles.title: 6 Simple Fixes That Cut Claude Token Usage for Busy Ministry Teams Using AI Every Day
articles.summary: Church leaders are spending more time in Claude than ever, writing sermons, drafting communications, building volunteer resources, and managing ministry operations. One problem keeps coming up: the credits run out faster than expected. Understanding how Claude actually processes your requests mak...
